title: Soulsong Vanilla+ Tech
description: Vanilla+ pack that is primarily focused on offering a fun vanilla-like experience with technical aspects being less emphasized than in my other packs. Feat. Botania, Create, Farmer's Delight, Tectonic, and More!
body:
Vanilla+ modpack that is primarily focused on offering a fun vanilla-like experience with technical aspects being less emphasized than in my other packs. Learn the basics of Botania and Create while exploring the overhauled terrain of Regions Unexplored and Tectonic, cooking with farmers delight, and making beautiful homes with Macaw's furniture and Rechiseled. 

Please note that some Create features seem glitchy in a way that I can't quite fix, specifically trains. The 1.20 version of Create is having some issues, and in fact it's just incompatible with the most recent versions of Sodium. We are currently using a fork with Sodium 0.5.x support until the main version is up to date, in the meantime be careful about trains.
